subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O servant, inasmuch as thou didst shelter him who came unto thee, and didst honor and exalt him. By God! Were it not for My fear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا عبد بما اجرت الذی ورد علیک و عززته و اکرمته تالله لو لا خوفی من
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
